title: nmap Scan Output
description: Network scan results from nmap. Each scan pushes multiple dataset items with a `recordType` discriminator: `port` (one per discovered port), `host` (one per scanned host), `script` (one per NSE script result), and `summary` (one per scan run with aggregate stats and the executed command).

scanResults.title: Scan Results
scanResults.description: All scan findings — discovered ports, host information, NSE script outputs, and the summary row. Filter the dataset by `recordType` (port|host|script|summary) to view a single category.

rawXml.title: Raw nmap XML
rawXml.description: Raw nmap -oX XML output for the scan, saved as `nmap-output.xml` in the key-value store for downstream tooling that prefers nmap's native format.
